visual_description: In a dimly lit room with a checkered floor, a dark door is ajar beside an ornate mirror and a bathtub. A shirtless, bloodied man climbs a staircase, his torso and arms visible under harsh backlighting, then pushes through a doorway. He looks upward with his mouth open, appearing to gasp or scream.
